creator: krichter@posteo.de
text:
There's no other output than the error message, i.e.

    # cd /usr/ports/devel/libclc
    # make install
    ===>  libclc-0.0.1.r222830 Does not build, missing <system_error> header.
    *** [install] Error code 1
    
    Stop in /usr/ports/devel/libclc.

`portsnap extract` doesn't help.
